description: CompositionPurple pinstriped shirt made of 100% cotton, has a tipped collar with front buttoned placket, patch pocket on left chest, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a curved hemFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold using a mild detergentDo not soakDry flat in shadeWarm ironStripes that add immense attitude to your wardrobe is what genesis brings into your life. The full sleeves are sure to keep the winter chill at bay, and you can roll them up to suit your style. Team this shirt with crisp formal pants, a neck tie and leather shoes for unparalleled cool.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight: 6'2''; Shoulders: 16"
